title: Man Pleads Guilty to Planning Attack at Taylor Swift Concert in Vienna
summary_full: Austrian prosecutors said the man plotted in 2024 to set off a bomb outside the concert, which was later canceled. He and another man still face separate charges.
summary_public: Austrian prosecutors said the man plotted in 2024 to set off a bomb outside the concert, which was later canceled. He and another man still face separate charges.
